name: Kreativ Broken Image Finder
description: Catch missing images early and keep content quality high across your site.
cardUse: Catch missing images across posts and pages before users see them.
metaDescription: Detect missing image references across posts and pages before they impact trust and UX.

detailItems.title: Broken media detection
detailItems.body: Scans content for missing or unreachable image references that harm trust and readability.

detailItems.title: Content-level visibility
detailItems.body: Highlights affected posts and pages so teams can prioritize high-impact fixes first.

detailItems.title: Maintenance ready
detailItems.body: Supports recurring quality checks as part of routine WordPress maintenance workflows.
